Say Forever in Style 

From intimate rooftop vows to 800-guest ballroom galas, our wedding atelier choreographs every moment — décor, cuisine, film and light.

A Stage for Every Story

The Grand Ballroom

Skyline Terrace

Open-air vows against the city skyline, wrapped in fairy light and sea breeze.

Garden Pavilion

An intimate glass pavilion set within our private gardens, framed by blossom.

How It Works

From Vision to Vows

01

Discovery

We listen to your story and craft a vision moodboard within 48 hours.

02

Design

3D renders of your décor, menu tastings and a fixed, transparent quote.

03

Rehearsal

A full walkthrough with every vendor, 72 hours before the day.

04

The Day

A dedicated team of 20 runs your celebration so you simply live it.

Your next unforgettable stay begins here.

Book direct for our best rate, guaranteed.

THE VIVI

A modern icon of hospitality — suites, spa, weddings and a two-Michelin-star restaurant beneath one roof.
